meaning: adj.暖和的,暖的,温暖的,色情的,激烈的,热烈的,多情的,兴奋的adv.(常用以构成复合词)暖和地vt.使温暖,弄热,使兴奋,使热烈vi.变暖和,变温暖,激动,同情,爱好n.暖,保暖物
examples: It's quite warm at the moment.
This sleeping bag is very warm.
It's lovely and warm in here.
On warm days, Bostonians migrate to this popular park to sunbathe, picnic and feed waterfowl.
The air is warm, rich with the smells of iodine, diesel, seaweed and salt.
